tools.name: capabilities
tools.description: Discover operations available on the current surface.

tools.name: send
tools.description: Create an immutable Agent Bridge v2 message.

tools.name: history
tools.description: Read visible messages after an opaque cursor.

tools.name: claim
tools.description: Atomically claim the next targeted delivery, or one eligible message when requested.

tools.name: list_delivery_events
tools.description: List the append-only event history for a delivery.

tools.name: cancel_delivery
tools.description: Cancel a delivery as its publisher.

tools.name: requeue_delivery
tools.description: Requeue a delivery as its publisher.

tools.name: negative_acknowledge
tools.description: Settle a claimed delivery for retry or dead letter.

tools.name: heartbeat
tools.description: Publish a leased runtime presence record.

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Replay a gateway outbox and refresh its inbox cache.
